data.body: STORY COMPLETE (config-loop). Env-var standardization done across EV-1..EV-4 (decomposed into 10 sub-tickets, all closed). Summary: full ~48-var inventory reviewed (decision log above); REBAR_<KEY> standardization with deprecation alias windows for every renamed public var; reads routed through the typed Config where a config key exists. Delivered: EV-1 sync model (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH/PULL + REBAR_PUSH/REBAR_NO_SYNC aliases, --no-pull); EV-2 dead/internal removals (PROJECT_ROOT, TICKET_CMD, REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH, _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE param-ify) + subprocess self-resolve; EV-3 user-facing renames (COMPACT_THRESHOLD, SCRATCH_BASE_DIR, REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC, TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR, REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT, LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->LOCK_MAX_RETRIES, ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT, REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS, REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-flip); EV-4 REBAR_LLM_RUNNER removed (runner derived). Every rename keeps the old name working during a deprecation window with a warning. Docs + tests throughout; full offline suite green (1968); ruff check+format clean; verify gate fail-closed preserved. ACs met.
